I've pinpointed `ChatBox.jsx` as the React component central to the Chat RAG functionality. My focus has shifted to understanding its initial implementation before modifications were attempted. I want to build a better model for this React component.


**Reconstructing the Original Structure**

I'm now diving into reconstructing the initial `ChatBox.jsx` component. Examination of `ChatBox.test.jsx` provided valuable clues about its expected functionality: input field, send button, API interaction (`queryRAG`), display of responses and sources, and error handling with a retry button. I've also found some of the original states in the truncated file.


","tool_calls":[{"name":"write_to_file","args":{"CodeContent":""const fs = require('fs');\nconst readline = require('readline');\nconst path = 'C:/Users/PC/.gemini/antigravity/brain/dfc6d833-873f-4810-a9b9-03dfb038a156/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl';\n\nasync function search() {\n  const fileStream = fs.createReadStream(path);\n  const rl = readline.createInterface({ input: fileStream, crlfDelay: Infinity });\n\n  let count = 0;\n  for await (const line of rl) {\n    if (line.includes('isDirectMode')) {\n      count++;\n      console.log(`Found direct mode match ${count}: Line length = ${line.length}`);\n      if (line.length < 5000) {\n        console.log(line);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nsearch();\n"","Description":""Create a script to search transcript.jsonl for isDirectMode to understand its definition"","IsArtifact":"false","Overwrite":"true","TargetFile":""c:\\Users\\PC\\OneDrive - ESPRIT\\Bureau\\HealthcareAI-NorthAfrica - Antigravity\\search_direct_mode.js"","toolAction":""Writing search_direct_mode.js script"","toolSummary":""Writing search_direct_mode.js""}}]}
